calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-20-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Shadi Shaffer, via Zoom, for Bruce Ross, Petitioner.

The court advises counsel of its skepticism with the notice provided for the hearing in this matter. Counsel offers clarification of the notices and acknowledges the oversight with the notices being filed in November with an October proof of service date and that a Notice of Petition to Administer Estate was filed on Dec-02-2022. Counsel offers additional advocacy on behalf of her petition. Upon consideration, the court notes that there are no appearances to object to the instant petition. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Mar-19-2014 is admitted to probate. Bruce Ross is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Dec-20-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Nazaruz. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
